# llms.txt

## Summary
I am a software engineer specializing in frontend engineering with solid backend experience. I build interactive, high-performance web experiences for businesses, focusing on clear UX, accessible UI, and measurable outcomes. I collaborate with distributed teams, ship production-ready features, and take products from idea to launch.

## Services
- Frontend engineering (React, Next.js, TypeScript)
- Design-to-code implementation with attention to accessibility and performance
- UI architecture, component systems, and design systems
- Product engineering: rapid prototyping, MVPs, and iterative shipping
- Backend integration: APIs, auth, data modeling, and deployment support

## Expertise
- Interactive user experiences, animations, and micro-interactions
- SEO-friendly, fast-loading web apps
- Cross-functional collaboration with design, product, and engineering
- Remote-first workflows and async communication

## Interests
- Open source, startups, and SaaS products
- Building and shipping side projects

## Audience
Founders, startups, and businesses that need a reliable frontend partner to build or improve web products.

## Contact
Use the contact form on this site or reach out via the links in the header/footer.
